fused_combine._doc: Fuse the weighted top-k combine into the GEMM epilogue (atomic-accumulate into one [M,N] fp32 buffer, no separate moe_sum_reduce). Opt-in; default False keeps the [M*top_k,N] scratch + sum(1). Accepted by the triton entry callable.

perf.regime: Grouped (batched-expert) GEMM with fused W4A16 dequant. Hides the moe_align_block_size dispatch build and the token-indexed scratch behind a single [M,N]-out interface. Perf unmeasured without a GPU; the token-slot block MUST equal the kernel BLOCK_SIZE_M.

notes: Portable Triton (runs on NVIDIA and AMD). grouped-GEMM tile autotune configs (BLOCK_SIZE_M/N/K, num_warps, num_stages, group_m) live in triton/configs.py and are selected by get_moe_int4_config(E,N,K,M); they are not exposed at the entry callable, so not declared as knobs here. Expert-parallel routing (expert_map) is supported by the entry callable but is a runtime input, not a perf knob.
